title: Clinic Data Export
description: Export this clinic's structured records for regulatory, migration, or legal purposes.
disabledNotice: Clinic data export is not currently available for your organization.
scopeWarning: This export contains structured clinic records only (patients, appointments, treatment cases, payments, tasks, messages, activity logs, insurance provisions, inventory). It does NOT include physical attachment or imaging files and must not be treated as a complete backup.
clinicSelectorAllClinicsNotice: "All clinics" is selected. Choose one specific clinic below to export its data.
restrictedNoteLabel: Internal note (optional, not included in audit logs)
confirmLabel: I understand this exports highly sensitive clinic data for {{clinicName}} and confirm this request.
downloadPasswordLabel: Confirm your current password to download

status.timedOut: Still not finished after 30 minutes — please check back later or contact support.

errors.clinicRequired: Please select a specific clinic before starting an export.
errors.confirmRequired: Please confirm before starting the export.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_DISABLED: Clinic data export is currently disabled.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_FORBIDDEN: You do not have access to export this clinic's data.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_ALREADY_RUNNING: An export is already in progress for this clinic.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_NOT_READY: This export is not ready for download yet.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_ALREADY_DOWNLOADED: This export has already been downloaded.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_EXPIRED: This export has expired. Please start a new one.
errors.CLINIC_BULK_EXPORT_TOKEN_ALREADY_ISSUED: A download link was already issued for this export.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
